title: Segmentation fault on a valid query with "union"
poc: create view v0 as select 0 as n;
create view v1 as select * from v0 union select * from v0;

key_bug_features: Creating multiple views with recursive union statements
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE VIEW v0 AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE value > 0;
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT * FROM v0 UNION SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
CREATE VIEW v2 AS SELECT * FROM v1 UNION SELECT id, name FROM v0 WHERE id < 5;
